metadata.name: ux_reconstructor_2.0
metadata.description: Exact UI Mirroring - Replicar conceptos visuales en código Tailwind/React con precisión 1:1.

title: UX RECONSTRUCTOR 2.0: Exact UI Mirroring
purpose: Replicar cualquier concepto visual o imagen en código Tailwind/React funcional y de alta fidelidad con precisión 1:1.

protocols.name: ACSS ALIGNMENT
actions: Map all extracted values to consistent design system (Adaptive CSS)

protocols.name: FIDELITY CHECK
actions: Contrast generated UI against concept and iterate until WOW factor achieved

tactical_patterns: mask-image for custom parchment/scanned edge effects
drop-shadow combined with text-shadow for holographic text
